grant_title: City of Rochester Housing Rehabilitation Programs
geographic_restrictions: City of Rochester, New York (Northeast US)
project_area: Housing rehabilitation, repair, lead hazard reduction, and healthy homes improvements
demographic_requirements: Household income at or below 80% of HUD's Area Median Income (AMI) for owner-occupants; 50% AMI for tenants in Lead Hazard Control Program; prioritization for seniors 62+ in Roof Program; minority and woman-owned business enterprises encouraged for contractors
eligibility_summary: Programs are available to owner-occupants, rental property owners, and contractors within the City of Rochester. Eligibility varies by program but generally requires property ownership, code compliance, current taxes and mortgage payments, and income thresholds. Specific programs may have additional requirements such as lead hazard remediation for pre-1978 housing or prioritization for low-income households.
